articles.title: Man arrested for possessing 2.6kg of ganja
articles.description: Trichy police arrested 27-year-old M. Karthik near Dheeran Nagar with 2.6 kg ganja worth Rs 62,250; booked under NDPS Act and remanded.

articles.title: Ab Hoga Hisaab Season 2 trailer out: Shaheer Sheikh and Sanjay Kapoor return for a more intense showdown
articles.description: Amazon MX Player releases Ab Hoga Hisaab Season 2 trailer, promising intensified conflict, betrayals and Bobby’s dangerous search for Bunty.

articles.title: Inside ‘Spectrum’: Tamil Nadu’s new system to predict and stop repeat sexual offenders
articles.description: The Home Department’s 2025-26 Policy Note showed that rape cases rose to 471 in 2024, while sexual harassment cases nearly doubled to 96.

articles.title: 'I mop floors, wash utensils, but still she...': Faridabad man dies by suicide after ‘harassment by wife, in-laws’
articles.description: The man said he was committing suicide because of his wife, her sister and parents and accused them of physical and mental harassment.

articles.title: Thota Vaikuntam: A grocery shop owner's son from a village who became one of India's most celebrated artists; his paintings are hung from National Gallery of Modern Art in New Delhi to Peabody Essex Museum in Massachusetts
articles.description: From a humble grocery shop in a Telangana village, Thota Vaikuntam's artistic journey blossomed. Despite early doubts, his dedication led him to international acclaim. Inspired by his mother and the women of his village, his distinctive paintings, featuring dusky-toned figures adorned with traditional elements, now grace museums worldwide. His unwavering commitment to his craft continues even in his eighties.

articles.title: Spent Too Much Time In The Sun? These DIY Face Packs Can Help
articles.description: These eight homemade de-tan face packs, made with ingredients like yogurt, cucumber and besan, may help soothe sunburnt skin, restore hydration and bring back your natural glow.

articles.title: Push for private participation in critical minerals sector took place during LDF rule: Satheesan
articles.description: UDF claims private participation in Kerala's critical minerals sector began under LDF rule, emphasizing past decisions by KMML.

articles.title: US Supreme Court rebuffs Donald Trump's appeal in E Jean Carroll case
articles.description: The US Supreme Court declined on Monday to hear President Donald Trump's bid to overturn a $5 million verdict in favor of E Jean Carroll in a case in which a jury found him liable for sexually abusing the former magazine columnist and then defaming her.

articles.title: Pride Month India Concludes On A Hopeful Note
articles.description: India's LGBTQIA+ community has come a long way over the years with some landmark achievements. But as Dhrubo Jyoti, Deputy Executive Editor, Hindustan Times, explains at the end of a month-long celebration of Pride month, some key issues still need addressing for us to achieve complete inclusivity as a country.

articles.title: Tourist surge forces curbs on visitor movement in Kerala’s Gavi
articles.description: Kerala's Gavi imposes visitor restrictions due to overwhelming tourist numbers impacting local safety and wilderness preservation.

articles.title: Greek yogurt vs hung curd: Which one of these is nutritionally superior (easy tips to prepare it at home from scratch)
articles.description: Greek yogurt and hung curd, often mistaken for twins, boast distinct preparation methods and nutritional profiles. While both offer protein and probiotics, Greek yogurt, fermented with specific cultures and strained more intensely, typically packs a higher protein punch. Hung curd, essentially strained regular curd, remains a healthy, versatile option. The choice hinges on your protein goals and culinary needs.

articles.description: Area under urad cultivation was down nearly 40% year-on-year as of June 19, according to government data

articles.title: Why are more Indians becoming DINK couples? Relationship expert reveals the reasons behind the growing trend
articles.description: The DINK trend is redefining relationship goals in India. Here are the reasons why marriage without children is becoming a conscious choice.

articles.description: Hombale Films announces a new project starring Suriya and Kayadu Lohar, directed by Jai Bhim filmmaker T. J. Gnanavel, with production officially beginning after a grand muhurtha ceremony in Chennai.

articles.description: Despite sharing screen space with Hollywood stars like Dame Judi Dench, Vin Diesel and Gerard Butler, Ali Fazal says only one actor truly left him starstruck - his lifelong idol, Al Pacino.

articles.title: The Classic Book That Feels Like A Reply To Hustle Culture
articles.description: Dickens’s 'Hard Times' feels newly urgent as a classic reply to hustle culture, exposing how facts, work and usefulness can crush imagination, tenderness and human worth today too easily now.

articles.title: Delhi Power Cut Today: BRPL Announces Scheduled Outages on June 29, Check Areas, Timings

articles.title: Roads in Venezuela's La Guaira State 90% Restored After Earthquakes: Acting President
articles.description: Roads in Venezuela's La Guaira State, which was hardest hit by the earthquakes, have been approximately 90% restored, while the water supply has been restored to 68%, Acting Venezuelan President Delcy Rodriguez said.

articles.title: Vir Das defends Kangana Ranaut over 'Revolver Rani' kissing rumour
articles.description: Vir Das denied rumours of being injured by Kangana Ranaut during a kissing scene in 'Revolver Rani'. He called the story 'pure fiction' and Kangana a 'complete professional'. Kangana also reacted, dismissing the viral claim on social media.

articles.title: Suryakumar Yadav celebrates 2nd anniversary of India's T20 WC win
articles.description: Suryakumar Yadav posted a heartwarming message on the second anniversary of India's T20 World Cup 2024 victory. He thanked fans for their support during the campaign, which saw India defeat South Africa in the final to end an 11-year ICC trophy drought.

articles.title: Bengaluru Techie's Rs 71,000 Monthly Spending, Including Weekend Trips, Goes Viral, Internet Reacts: ‘I’m Poor’
articles.description: A Bengaluru tech professional's viral Reddit post detailed a Rs 71,000 monthly budget, with Rs 20,000 allocated to weekend trips, sparking a social media debate. Users debated whether this reflected a comfortable lifestyle or lifestyle inflation. While some found the spending excessive, others defended it as a personal choice based on priorities.

articles.title: Shiv Sena warns Kharge over RSS remarks, 'happiness won't last long'
articles.description: Shiv Sena's Karnataka President Andola Siddalinga Swami criticized Home Minister Priyank Kharge for his remarks on the RSS, saying his 'happiness will not last long' and calling on him to respond to a Bengaluru court summons issued over his comments.

articles.title: Dharmendra Pradhan witnesses Snana Yatra at Puri's Jagannath Temple
articles.description: Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan offered prayers at Puri's Jagannath Temple during the 'Snana Yatra'. The festival involves the ceremonial bathing of the deities with 108 pots of water before the annual Rath Yatra.

articles.title: Adani case: US court seeks DOJ clarification on dropping charges
articles.description: A US court has sought clarification from the Department of Justice on its motion to drop charges against Gautam and Sagar Adani. US lawyer Adam Goldberg says this is a routine procedure and the judge is likely to approve the DOJ's request.

articles.title: Kirtland Air Force Base Alert: Shelter-In-Place Ordered After Bomb Threat
articles.description: A reported bomb threat triggered an emergency response at Kirtland Air Force Base in Albuquerque, New Mexico, prompting a temporary shelter-in-place order across the installation.

articles.title: Vinicius Jr.'s emotional World Cup moment leaves fans stunned after grandmother's heartfelt surprise
articles.description: ​Vinicius Jr. has become one of Brazil’s brightest stars at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, but his latest headlines haven’t been about goals or records. The Real Madrid striker was struck with emotion when he received an unexpected message from the woman who helped shape his life from childhood ahead of Brazil's quarterfinal game against Japan.

Yash Raj Films makes first bet on vertical entertainment with Rusk Media investment
articles.description: Yash Raj Films is venturing into the burgeoning digital-first entertainment space with a strategic investment in Rusk Media. This move signals YRF's expansion into mobile-first storytelling, focusing on original animation and vertical micro-dramas. The partnership aims to create category-defining intellectual property for global digital platforms, leveraging India's massive mobile audience and establishing the country as a creative force in vertical entertainment.

articles.title: Big Bear eaglet Sandy survived a terrifying fall, but the real threat begins after its first flight
articles.description: Big Bear Lake bald eaglet Sandy experienced an 'accidental fledge' after a fall from its nest, surprisingly taking its first flight to safety. While parents Jackie and Shadow are providing support, wildlife experts warn that the real challenges for young eagles are just beginning. Sibling rivalry, starvation, disease, and predators.

articles.title: Who Was Natalia Villalba? Woman Found Dead In Suitcase Of UK Man Matthew Ashley Foster-Smith
articles.description: Natalia Villalba, 36, was found dead inside a suitcase in Colombia after authorities alleged she was killed on June 18. British national Matthew Ashley Foster-Smith was later arrested in Ecuador.
